title: Apollo’s West Technology Is in Talks to Sell Remaining Business
description: Apollo Global Management Inc.-backed West Technology is engaged in exclusive talks to sell its remaining operating business to a counter-party, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Musk, Altman Make Final Pitches to Jury in Battle Over OpenAI
description: A jury will soon cast a vote and a judge will ultimately decide the outcome of a high-stakes showdown between Elon Musk and Sam Altman over OpenAI, the artificial intelligence startup they founded together more than a decade ago.

title: AI Buildout Drives 76% Power Bill Jump on Largest US Grid
description: Power prices on the largest electric grid in the US jumped 76% in the first quarter due to rampant demand from data centers, adding to pressure on its operator to alleviate the strain on consumers.
